project.name: Olise
project.description: Olise (T3 Labs) â€” caregiver pediatric behavioral health platform. Phase 0 buildout: chat, auth, programs, routines, Supabase, Azure brain.
project.content:
## Scope

Three repos: `olise-ui`, `olise-supabase`, `olise-brain`.

## Current state

- Auth + consent + setup wizard working on staging
- Chat MVP: stream via brain, markdown, Supabase sessions/messages, sidebar recents
- Model chain: Sonnet â†’ Haiku â†’ OpenAI (OpenAI tier pending keys)
- Olise rebrand in UI (Azure/GitHub names still legacy `nira-*`)

## Domains

- Target: `olise.co`, `staging.olise.co`

issues.title: Wire OpenAI / Azure OpenAI fallback on brain (tier 3)
issues.description: Add `OPENAI_API_KEY` or Azure OpenAI env vars to `nira-brain-staging` container app. Verify `/ready` shows `openai: configured`. Test failover when Claude is overloaded.

issues.title: Personalized brain prompts (caregiver profile + children)
issues.description: Load `caregiver_profiles` and `children` from Supabase in brain. Use `buildSystemPrompt()` with display name and child context. No session DB checks â€” keep simple proxy.

issues.title: Log model provider + model id per chat response
issues.description: Brain logs which tier served the request (sonnet/haiku/openai). Optional: add `model_provider` + `model_id` columns on `messages` table for analytics.

issues.title: Programs catalog: read from Supabase instead of static TS
issues.description: Replace `programs.ts` / `getProgram()` with Supabase queries. Seed data already in `programs` table. Update ProgramRunner and sidebar.

issues.title: Routines catalog: read from Supabase instead of static TS
issues.description: Replace `routines.ts` / `getRoutine()` with Supabase queries. Seed data already in `routines` table.

issues.title: Sync program progress to Supabase
issues.description: Persist `program_progress` to `program_progress` table instead of local storage only (`olise-program-progress`). Load on app start.

issues.title: Sync routine check-ins to Supabase
issues.description: Persist routine history to `check_in_entries` table instead of local storage only (`olise-routine-history`).

issues.title: Deploy staging UI (olise-ui)
issues.description: Host `dist/` on Azure Static Web Apps or similar. Configure build-time env: `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`, `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `VITE_BRAIN_URL`.

issues.title: DNS: staging.olise.co + Supabase auth redirect URLs
issues.description: Point `staging.olise.co` at staging UI. Add redirect URLs in Supabase dashboard for signup/verify flows.

issues.title: Chat E2E QA pass (when Anthropic available)
issues.description: Verify: send â†’ stream â†’ markdown; refresh preserves thread; sidebar recents; reopen session; overload triggers Haiku fallback.

issues.title: Push repos to GitHub (olise-ui, olise-supabase, olise-brain)
issues.description: Create three GitHub repos under T3 Labs org. Push local code. Optional: rename remotes from legacy `nira-*` folder names.

issues.title: GitHub Actions: brain staging deploy secrets
issues.description: Configure `AZURE_CREDENTIALS`, `AZURE_CONTAINER_APP_NAME`, `AZURE_RESOURCE_GROUP`, `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in GitHub staging environment for `olise-brain` workflows.

issues.title: GitHub Actions: Supabase migration CI
issues.description: Configure `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` + `SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF` for staging/production migrate workflows in `olise-supabase`.

issues.title: Provision Supabase production project
issues.description: Create `olise-prod` with HIPAA config. No real PHI until launch. Run migrations. Do not point local dev at prod.

issues.title: Provision Azure brain production
issues.description: Container App `olise-brain-prod` (or rename from legacy). ACR, secrets, manual deploy workflow.

issues.title: DNS: olise.co production (reserved, no traffic pre-launch)
issues.description: Reserve production DNS. Wire UI + brain custom domains when ready for launch.

issues.title: Rename Azure resources from nira-* to olise-*
issues.description: Optional cleanup: `nira-brain-staging`, `nira-staging-rg`, `nirabrainstgacr`, Docker image names. Document migration â€” not blocking.

issues.title: Rename GitHub repos to olise-*
issues.description: Rename `nira-chat-ui` â†’ `olise-ui`, `nira-supabase` â†’ `olise-supabase`, `nira-brain` â†’ `olise-brain`. Update local remotes.

issues.title: Safety pipeline: crisis detection in chat path
issues.description: Re-enable crisis keyword stub in brain chat flow. Persist `crisis_events`. UI crisis message styling exists.

issues.title: RAG / knowledge retrieval (pgvector)
issues.description: Wire `knowledge_documents` + `knowledge_chunks` into brain chat. Embeddings via Azure OpenAI. Deferred from Phase 0 MVP.

issues.title: Assessments foundation â€” UI + storage
issues.description: Schema exists for assessments. Build UI flows and brain integration when product scope is locked.

issues.title: Eval harness for chat quality
issues.description: Regression tests for prompts, safety, and model fallback. Run against staging brain.

issues.title: Supabase BAA + HIPAA compliance checklist
issues.description: Execute Supabase BAA. Verify Team plan + HIPAA add-on on staging/prod. Document in INFRA.

issues.title: API key rotation policy
issues.description: Document and schedule rotation for Anthropic, OpenAI, Supabase service role. User deferred until build stabilizes.

issues.title: Capacitor sync after Olise bundle id change
issues.description: Run `npm run cap:sync` before next iOS/Android build. Bundle id now `co.olise.app`.

issues.title: Optional: show fallback model indicator in chat UI
issues.description: When brain serves Haiku/OpenAI tier, show subtle footer e.g. 'Using backup assistant'. Requires SSE meta event from brain.

issues.title: Child memories pipeline
issues.description: `child_memories` table exists. Design when/how assistant extracts and confirms memories from chat.

issues.title: Conversation summaries
issues.description: Populate `conversation_summaries` for long threads. Background job or on-session-close in brain.

issues.title: Programs/routines admin or CMS
issues.description: Future: edit catalog without code deploy. Supabase as source of truth is prerequisite (separate tickets).

issues.title: Production launch: traffic + monitoring
issues.description: Enable prod traffic, health checks, alerting on brain `/health` and Supabase. Phase 0 exit criteria.
